author: .paulharris
content: in gloas we're going from attestations with 'always 0' committee index, to attestations that can have index 0 or 1 to flag if payloads are seen. Wondering if we need more space available in attestations per block again... i guess it depends how often validators don't have a consistent view wrt payload...

author: potuz
content: I don't think we need more attestation space. What's going to happen is that attestations that miss head will vote with index 1

author: potuz
content: With the current space it's good enough to recover from any split I think.

author: .paulharris
content: ok all good, makes sense i guess

author: potuz
content: Anyway we can always add some it's not that important neither CPU nor bandwidth wise

author: .paulharris
content: yeh it's not a huge space issue now
